overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the NCART monorail system in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The journey travels through dark concrete tunnels, stops at the Memorial Park station with pedestrians on the platform, then emerges onto elevated tracks winding through a dense cyberpunk cityscape of towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards at dusk.

events.description: train approaches tunnel exit and arrives at Memorial Park station platform

agents.ego_description: traveling on the NCART train through a dimly lit concrete tunnel illuminated by red emergency lights

entered.detail: rough gray concrete tunnel wall with vertical seams
horizontal red LED emergency lighting strips mounted on tunnel ceiling
metal rails and concrete track bed visible through the front of the train

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dark, enclosed concrete tunnel with red emergency lighting. The train moves steadily forward toward a bright exit, with rough tunnel walls passing by on both sides and the metal tracks visible ahead.

events.description: train decelerates and comes to a complete stop at the station platform
train doors close and train begins accelerating out of the station

agents.ego_description: stopped at Memorial Park station observing pedestrians waiting on the platform near decorative trees and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket standing near the platform edge looking at the train
seated pedestrian on concrete bench wearing white hair and dark coat

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow neon sign reading MEMORIAL PARK on the station wall
large potted tree with dense foliage in a circular planter on the platform
floor-to-ceiling glass panels separating the platform from the station interior
concrete and metal bench where passengers are seated

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at the well-lit Memorial Park station platform, where several pedestrians are waiting. A large decorative tree stands in the center of the platform, and a bright yellow neon sign illuminates the station name. The train stops to allow passengers to board, then departs back into the tunnel system.

events.description: train accelerates rapidly departing the station into the dark tunnel

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the dark tunnel immediately after departing Memorial Park station

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete tunnel walls with horizontal red light strips
repeating pattern of red emergency lighting along the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The train plunges back into darkness immediately after leaving the station, traveling through a narrow concrete tunnel illuminated only by red emergency lights. The walls rush by as the train gains speed heading toward the surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated NCART track through downtown Night City

events.description: train exits the tunnel into open air between massive skyscrapers
lighting shifts from artificial red to natural dusk light mixed with neon city glow
train begins slowing down as it approaches the next station stop

agents.ego_description: traveling at high speed along elevated tracks through the dense urban canyon, passing holographic advertisements and towering glass skyscrapers

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with Japanese characters and TENGU in blue neon
tall building with large illuminated 01 sign near the top
floating holographic advertisements and digital screens between buildings
metal support beams and concrete track bed of the elevated railway
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The train bursts out of the tunnel into the open air, revealing a breathtaking view of Night City's dense skyline. The track winds between towering glass and steel skyscrapers adorned with glowing neon signs and holographic advertisements. The train travels at high speed along the elevated rails, passing the iconic TENGU sign and building 01, before beginning to slow for the next station as the city stretches into the hazy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic depths of a concrete tunnel into the sprawling, neon-lit expanse of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within a dark enclosure illuminated by red emergency lighting, moving steadily forward until the darkness gives way to the bright, sterile environment of the Memorial Park station. After a brief stop beside a decorative tree and a glowing yellow neon sign, the train plunges back into a narrow, red-lit tunnel where the walls rush by as the vehicle accelerates. The scene then bursts open into the open air, revealing a breathtaking skyline of towering glass skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The camera glides at high speed along elevated rails past the iconic TENGU sign and building 01 before finally slowing as the hazy city stretches toward the horizon.
